title: Design a Set of Colored Boxes
description: Five colored boxes arranged in a CSS grid, each using a different color format: hexadecimal, RGB, a named color, HSL, and a fifth of free choice. The layout demonstrates how different CSS color syntaxes produce the same fundamental result.
objectives: Use a hexadecimal value to set a background color
Use rgb() to define a color with red, green, and blue channels
Use a named CSS color keyword
Use hsl() to define a color by hue, saturation, and lightness
Arrange elements in a responsive grid with auto-fill columns

files.name: index.html
files.content: Colored Boxes
